name: B.O.O.M.
description: Summon When the entire Scientific Summoner Set is equipped, the summon changes to:
effects: Early Prototype: The M.E.R.V. becomes unstable after 5 seconds. Unstable M.E.R.V: Shoots 3 paralyzing shots thrice, then explodes for 1250 damage in 4.5 squares. Shots hit multiple targets
